root_cause: External payment gateway API experiencing high latency and timeouts
evidence: Payment gateway status page reports degraded performance
resolution: Implemented circuit breaker pattern and increased timeout to 45 seconds
fix_commands: Deploy updated application with circuit breaker library
preventive_measures: Implement circuit breaker for all external dependencies
Add fallback mechanisms (retry with exponential backoff)
Set up alerts for dependency failures
Consider multi-provider strategy for critical services
